---
name: Report sensitive or personal data
about: Flag a contribution that appears to contain PII or sensitive data
title: "[sensitive-data] "
labels: ["privacy", "urgent"]
---

<!--
Thank you for flagging this. Please DO NOT paste the sensitive value itself into this
public issue — just point to where it is. We'll remove or redact it promptly.
-->

**Which contribution?**
<!-- folder path, e.g. contributions/user-3f9a/ -->

**Which file(s)?**
<!-- e.g. physiological_cycles.csv, or a journal file that slipped through -->

**What kind of data?** (do not paste the actual value)

- [ ] An email address
- [ ] A real name / handle
- [ ] A `journal` file
- [ ] Free-text notes with personal details
- [ ] Other (describe below, without quoting the sensitive value)

**Notes:**
